name: Shivansh Verma
headline: Project Manager @ Gigzs | Tech Lead – NASA Space Apps Nagpur | Full-Stack & AI Engineer
about: Developer focused on building practical, reliable systems that work beyond the basics. I value clarity, efficiency, and building systems that hold up in real-world use cases. Passionate about AI architecture, space, and automotive engineering.

experience.description: Leading product strategy and cross-functional teams for an AI-powered gig marketplace. Owned full-stack delivery, defined product roadmap, and managed a 6-person team to reach 500+ users.
Delivered 5+ client projects across web, mobile, and cross-platform including a live founder networking app and a US real estate MLS platform.
Orchestrated city-wide hackathons in Nagpur, led technical mentorship, and managed event infrastructure for hundreds of participants.
Managed technical web infrastructure, official communications, and technical outreach for the Computer Society and student branch.

projects.title: Gigzs Memory Layer (GML)
projects.description: A semantic, relational memory system for AI that models Entities, Relationships, and Events as vector embeddings for long-term contextual recall.

projects.title: Drishti Cap
projects.description: Wearable camera-cap on Raspberry Pi delivering real-time object detection and facial recognition for the visually impaired. Uses optimized YOLOv8 for edge inference.

projects.title: ArqivAI
projects.description: AI-Powered Research Assistant that integrates multiple AI models to reduce hallucinations using intelligent confidence scoring.

education.school: G.H. Raisoni College of Engineering, Nagpur
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering
education.description: Currently maintaining a 8.95 CGPA. Focused on systems architecture and AI.

certifications.name: Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification
